name: internal-links
description: Verify that internal links found on the homepage are accessible (HTTP 200) and do not display a 404 error page

testCases.name: should return HTTP 200 for internal links found on the homepage
steps: Look at HOMEPAGE INTERNAL LINKS in context — these are the actual hrefs crawled from the live homepage
From that list, pick 10 to 20 representative links (favour top-level section roots, skip deeply nested or duplicate paths)
Create a for…of loop at describe level (NOT inside a single test) over that fixed list
For each route, create a separate test() that sends a GET request with maxRedirects: 5
If the response status is 404, call test.skip(true, 'Route not available in this project')
assertions: Each selected homepage link returns HTTP 200
Links that return 404 are skipped with test.skip(), not failed

testCases.name: should not display a 404 error page on the primary homepage
steps: Look at HOMEPAGE INTERNAL LINKS — navigate to the first locale homepage found (e.g. /fr, /en)
Assert page title does not contain '404'
Assert no heading with visible text '404' exists on the page
